scripts.publish:core: pnpm --filter @bundy-lmw/hive-core build && cd packages/core && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:feishu: pnpm --filter @bundy-lmw/hive-plugin-feishu build && cd packages/plugins/feishu && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:server: pnpm --filter @bundy-lmw/hive-server build && cd apps/server && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm publish --access public
scripts.publish:all: pnpm publish:core && pnpm publish:server && pnpm publish:feishu
